summary: CMS Dynamic Pages migration testing complete. All 6 pages (why-lexa, big-homes-break-smart, villa-operating-model, integrations, case-studies, glossary) successfully use useCms hook with CMS data + hardcoded fallbacks. Backend: 9/9 API tests passed. Frontend: 6/6 pages load correctly with CMS content. Admin CMS: 6/6 new section entries visible in Core Pages category.

cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections/page_why_lexa: PASS - Returns {key, value} with hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_badge, advantages, comparisons, stats
cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections/page_big_homes_bre: PASS - Returns {key, value} with hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_badge, problems, hidden_costs, comparison
cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections/page_villa_operati: PASS - Returns {key, value} with hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_badge, roles (4), benefits
cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections/page_integrations: PASS - Returns {key, value} with hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_badge, platforms array
cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections/page_case_studies: PASS - Returns {key, value} with hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_badge, studies array
cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections/page_glossary: PASS - Returns {key, value} with hero_title, hero_subtitle, hero_badge, hero_description
cms_section_apis.GET /api/cms/sections bulk endpoint: PASS - Returns multiple sections in single request

frontend_pages./why-lexa: PASS - Shows 'OUR DIFFERENCE' badge, 'WHY CHOOSE LEXA' heading, 8 advantages grid, comparison table
frontend_pages./big-homes-break-smart: PASS - Shows 'INDUSTRY INSIGHT' badge, 'Why Big Homes Break Smart' heading, 5 Critical Failures section with problems
frontend_pages./villa-operating-model: PASS - Shows 'ACCESS MANAGEMENT' badge, 'Villa Operating Model' heading, 4 roles (Owners, Family, Guests, Staff)
frontend_pages./integrations: PASS - Shows 'TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS' badge, 'PLATFORM AGNOSTIC ARCHITECTURE' heading, platform categories with 38+ brand cards
frontend_pages./case-studies: PASS - Shows 'OUR WORK' badge, 'CASE STUDIES' heading, case study cards with location, budget, features
frontend_pages./glossary: PASS - Shows 'KNOWLEDGE BASE' badge, 'SMART HOME GLOSSARY' heading, search functionality, 114 terms organized A-Z

admin_cms_sections.Why LEXA Page: VISIBLE in Core Pages (12) - Advantages, comparisons, stats — why choose LEXA
admin_cms_sections.Big Homes Break Smart: VISIBLE in Core Pages - Industry insight: problems, hidden costs, LEXA comparison
admin_cms_sections.Villa Operating Model: VISIBLE in Core Pages - Roles (Owner, Family, Guest, Staff), access rules, benefits
admin_cms_sections.Integrations & Partners: VISIBLE in Core Pages - Platform categories, brand lists, tier labels
admin_cms_sections.Case Studies Listing: VISIBLE in Core Pages - Case study cards with location, budget, features, results
admin_cms_sections.Glossary Page: VISIBLE in Core Pages - Hero text, badge, description for glossary page

seed_data_creation: Content seeded into 'settings' MongoDB collection with keys: page_why_lexa, page_big_homes_break_smart, page_villa_operating_model, page_integrations, page_case_studies, page_glossary. Each contains structured content objects used by useCms hook.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS migration for 6 pages complete. Each page uses useCms('page_key', null) hook which fetches from /api/cms/sections/{key}. The CMS returns {key, value} where value is the content object. Pages fall back to hardcoded content if CMS value is null. Icon mapping in pages converts string icon names to React components (e.g., iconMap['Award'] || Award). Admin CMS panel at /admin/cms shows all 6 sections under 'Core Pages' category with 12 total entries.
